name: Feature request
about: A capability that doesn't exist yet

## The use case

What are you trying to do? A real concrete example beats a generic
"would be nice to have". Examples:

- "I want to plug GPT-4o into the VisionBackend ABC so we can
  benchmark its computer-use scores against Holo3 on our own tasks."
- "I want per-task cost-tagging so I can group spend by 'customer A
  vs customer B' for billing."

## What you'd like the API to look like

```bash
# proposed CLI or curl example
```

## Why this isn't in TRACKING.md / WILL NOT do already

(Two-sentence sanity check. If the feature IS in the
["WILL NOT do"](../TRACKING.md#items-we-will-not-do-explicitly-out-of-scope)
list, this template asks you to make the case for adding it. If it's
already in TRACKING.md as a known-deferred item, please comment on
that issue instead. If it's the multi-user case, the sibling
[atelier-os](https://github.com/karany97/atelier-os) is where that
belongs — destiny-computer stays single-desktop by design.)

## Acceptance criteria

A checkable list of what "done" means.

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ] Test added under `driver/src/test_*.py` (stdlib-only preferred)
